"CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "## Summary

Existing-session browser interaction routes bypassed SSRF policy enforcement.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.10`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.10`

## Impact

Existing-session browser interaction routes could continue interacting with or navigating targets without applying the same SSRF navigation guard used by guarded browser routes.

## Technical Details

The fix guards existing-session navigation and interaction routes with browser navigation policy checks.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #64370. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.10`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `daeb74920d5ad986cb600625180037e23221e93a`
- PR: #64370

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.10 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @zsxsoft, with sponsorship from @KeenSecurityLab and @qclawer for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00253, "percentile": 0.16513}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-527m-976r-jf79", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T22:11:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-527m-976r-jf79", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-527m-976r-jf79"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43573"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-05T12:16:21Z", "published_at": "2026-04-17T22:11:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-527m-976r-jf79", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/64370", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/daeb74920d5ad986cb600625180037e23221e93a", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43573", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-ssrf-policy-bypass-in-existing-session-browser-interaction-routes", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-527m-976r-jf79"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-527m-976r-jf79", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Existing-session browser interaction routes bypassed SSRF policy enforcement", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T21:48:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-527m-976r-jf79", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
